reasoning: The Lean signature faithfully captures each piece of the informal statement: `hp : p.Prime` encodes "p is prime"; `[Fintype G] [Group G]` together with `hG : card G = p ^ α` encodes "G is a (finite) group of order p^α"; `α : ℕ` with `ha : α > 0` precisely matches "α ∈ ℤ⁺"; and `∀ H : Subgroup G, H.index = p → H.Normal` matches "every subgroup of index p is normal."
